---
title: "Susan Spratt"
---

## Susan Spratt

**Dates:** (1826-1856)

### Description

schoolmistress, sister of Harriet Spratt

### Biography

She married (1848) George Wallingford.  She is probably to be identified with the aunt who went into a decline, referred to in the letter to Blanche C. Medhurst [info Barrie Spratt]

### Letters

- Letter from [1878?]
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
